title: The Destruction of Jerusalem
description:
The Great Controversy between good and evil has played out since the conflict in heaven between Christ and Satan. In the last 2000 years of human history, we have seen this battle play out on Earth. However, one day evil will be ended, and peace will reign in the universe.

Join us each week on a journey through the book ‘Great Controversy’ as we learn where we have come from and where we are headed!

title: Persecution in the Early Centuries
description: When the storm of opposition arose, the faithful disciples of Jesus stood firm, preferring death to dishonesty. In this chapter, explore the trials and triumphs of the early Christian church under the Roman Empire.

title: An Era of Spiritual Darkness
description: How did compromise and pagan traditions creep into the Christian church, ushering in centuries of spiritual oppression and darkness? Discover the rise of papal power and the preservation of truth by a faithful minority.
